headline: SPS Commerce Announces Agreement to Sell 3P Revenue Recovery Business
summary: Sale Sharpens Company’s Focus on Strategic Opportunity with 1P SuppliersMINNEAPOLIS, June 30, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- SPS Commerce, Inc. (NASDAQ: SPSC), the leading intelligent supply chain network, today announced it has completed the sale of its 3P Revenue Recovery business. The company previously acquired the business through the Carbon6 Technologies, Inc. (Carbon6) acquisition which closed on February 7, 2025.
